items.summary: Results-driven Game Designer with 3+ years designing player-first mobile game systems that drive community engagement and long-term retention. At PlaySimple Games, designed economy and progression systems for Word Roll (40k+ DAU) that delivered 71% monetization improvements and 35% retention increases through data-driven feature design and social engagement mechanics. Proven expertise in end-to-end feature ownership - from ideation to launch - including LiveOps events, reward systems, and competitive social features that contributed to 10x user growth. Passionate about creating social gaming experiences that bring players together while driving sustainable business metrics through balanced economies and compelling progression loops.

• Designed comprehensive event infrastructure and reward systems for Word Roll's competitive features, creating social engagement mechanics that improved player interaction frequency by 43% and established reusable framework for community-driven events

• Architected progression systems and reward economies (including gacha mechanics and cosmetic systems) that increased player lifetime value by 10% while maintaining fair play balance across diverse skill levels

• Launched 5+ personalized social events using Kinoa.io cohort targeting and community mechanics, achieving 23% higher engagement rates and fostering player-to-player interaction through competitive leaderboards and shared goals

• Analyzed behavioral patterns across 40k+ DAU using A/B testing frameworks, identifying community engagement opportunities that influenced social feature roadmap and drove 35% retention improvements

• Authored comprehensive feature specifications for 25+ major systems (seasonal events, battle pass, PvP leaderboards), enabling cross-functional teams to deliver features 30% faster with 95% requirement accuracy

• Conducted competitive analysis of 50+ mobile games using SensorTower and Data.ai, identifying 8 monetization opportunities that influenced product roadmap and contributed to 71% revenue increase

• Spearheaded Word Roll feature roadmap during hypergrowth phase (2024-2025), contributing to 10x DAU expansion from 4k to 40k+ users through strategic feature prioritization

• Developed AI-powered productivity tools (Spec Maker, Meeting Manager) using Cursor AI, reducing feature documentation time by 25% and accelerating sprint planning by 40% across 8-person team
Specialized in mobile game design, game economy systems, and player psychology. Focused on F2P monetization strategies, retention mechanics, and social gaming systems.
Developed strong analytical thinking, problem-solving, and communication skills. Specialized in contract law and intellectual property.

items.description: Community-driven event system fostering social interaction and monetization
items.summary: Designed Food Fiesta event mechanics featuring balanced gacha systems and progressive rewards, generating 71% monetization increase and establishing template for future LiveOps events that enhanced community interaction. Created reusable event infrastructure that became standard for social gaming initiatives.

items.name: Community Building Innovation - Ticket Mania
items.description: Social competitive system building organic player communities
items.summary: Redesigned Ticket Mania leaderboard architecture with skill-based matchmaking and dynamic rewards, creating organic social groups around competitive goals that increased player LTV by 10% and improved D1 retention rate by 300 basis points. Transformed passive competitive features into community-building platforms.

items.name: Player Experience Optimization - Word of the Day
items.description: Interactive social learning feature fostering daily engagement
items.summary: Transformed Word of the Day from passive feature to interactive collection mechanic that fostered daily engagement habits, achieving 140 basis points D1 retention improvement and 3% overall engagement increase through community-driven content discovery.

items.name: AI Innovation & Team Productivity
items.description: Custom AI tools revolutionizing game design workflow
items.summary: Built AI-assisted Spec Maker and Meeting Manager tools that became standard workflow for 8-person development team, improving documentation efficiency by 25% and establishing culture of productivity innovation. Pioneered AI-human collaboration in game design process.

items.name: Hypergrowth Product Leadership
items.description: Strategic feature leadership during critical scaling phase
items.summary: Led Word Roll through critical hypergrowth phase, contributing to 10x DAU expansion from 4k to 40k+ users through strategic feature prioritization, community-focused design decisions, and sustainable economy design that maintained player satisfaction during rapid scaling.
